use_cases: Mood or emotion selection in feedback and survey forms
Visual category or preference selection in settings interfaces
Star-rating style selection replaced with emoji reactions
Poll or quiz answer selection with expressive options
User sentiment or reaction collection in media applications
ai_summary: An accessible emoji-based radio group component built on Radix UI primitives with hover scale animations and keyboard navigation support. Features emoji icons with labels in a compact rounded container, with visual state indicators for selected items. Suitable for mood tracking, sentiment analysis, and preference selection across web applications.
